message.content:
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core
header Intel Corporation
footer Proprietary and Confidential

skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor "User/Admin" as User
participant "CLI" as CLI
participant "Af Microservice" as Af
participant "NEF" as NEF
participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC

box "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" #LightBlue
  participant CLI
  participant Af
  participant NEF
end box

box "5G Core Components" #LightGreen
  participant NGC
end box

note right of NEF: Smart Edge Open provided\nCore component with\nlimited functionality

frame "Policy Authorization - Application Session Context GET flow" {
  User -> CLI: Get app session context with\nappSessionId
  CLI -> Af: /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
  Af -> NGC: /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions/{appSessionId}\nGET
  NGC --> Af: 200 OK: app-session\ninformation \\ ERROR
  Af --> CLI: 200 OK: app-session\ninformation \\ ERROR
  CLI --> User: Success: app-session\ninformation
}

@enduml
